prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to England and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The Livestock Demographic Data Groups (LDDG) include representatives from the Animal and Plant Health Agency (APHA), which operates in England and has responsibilities related to livestock health and management. This indicates that the reports generated by LDDG are relevant to policies and practices affecting England.
